summary: The user sought assistance in evaluating the development of players transitioning from academy to elite level in team sports, focusing on strength tests conducted over time. The discussion included statistical methods for analysis, specifically repeated-measures ANOVA, and the user requested R code for implementation while considering the structure of their dataset.
facts: The user is analyzing the development of players transitioning from academy to elite level in team sports. The user has a dataset named "both_debuttest3_selecttest" containing variables such as name, strength, and months_from_transition. The user is interested in conducting a repeated-measures ANOVA to evaluate strength development over time. The user encountered an error in R related to the variable "Test" not being a factor or having only one level. The user was advised to check and convert the "Test" variable to a factor if necessary.
